response.justification: Candidate exceeds the 15-year software engineering requirement with 20 years of continuous experience and demonstrates strong technical innovation through multiple projects and teaching contributions. However, the role requires director-level seniority and AI strategy expertise—areas where the candidate shows promise (recent AI agent infrastructure work at re:cinq) but insufficient demonstrated track record. The lack of an advanced degree in AI and limited evidence of shipped AI products are notable gaps against preferred qualifications.
strengths: Exceeds experience requirement with 20 years of continuous software engineering across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Demonstrates innovation and knowledge leadership through multiple open-source projects (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial) and extensive teaching, mentoring, and workshop delivery
Current role involves direct AI agent infrastructure and MCP framework work, showing active engagement with cutting-edge AI technologies
concerns: Current staff engineer role does not demonstrate director-level individual contributor seniority or strategic responsibility required for the position
No master's degree or PhD in AI-related field and no demonstrated shipped AI products or platforms, limiting recognized AI expertise
Cloud infrastructure expertise appears secondary (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes mentioned across roles) rather than primary strategic focus area

key_factors.factor: Software engineering depth and innovation track record
